subcodes.first_line: O Nasru'llah! The Wronged One maketh mention of thee with that wherefrom the sincere ones perceive the fragrance of My loving-kindness and the unitarians the sweet-scented breaths [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نصرالله یذکرک المظلوم بما یجد منه المخلصون عرف عنایتی و الموحدون نفحات
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @eulogies; reminiscences, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment
